news.headline: Minnesota sues for access to evidence in killings of Good and Pretti
news.summary:
Minnesota sued ⁠the federal government on Tuesday, seeking ⁠access to evidence in the fatal shootings by federal officers of Renee Good and Alex Pretti and a shooting that injured another man during an immigration enforcement surge in the state, according to a complaint.

news.headline: Several injured as Karachi-bound Tezgam Express derails near Punjab’s Lodhran: official
news.summary:
<p>LAHORE: Several people were injured when a Karachi-bound train derailed near Punjab’s Lodhran on Tuesday night, officials said.</p>
